```py
                         jop.operand[0].Family() == tp and \
                         jop.operand[1].type == UD_OP_REG and \
                         jop.operand[1].base in (UD_R_EBP, UD_R_RBP):
                        vmreg = True
                    elif vmreg and jop.mnemonic == UD_Ipush and \
                         jop.operand[0].TSZ() == (UD_OP_MEM, 32) and \
                         jop.operand[0].Family() == tp:
                        reg = jop.operand[0].base
                        for x in xchg:
                            if j >= x.index and j < x.index + 4:
                                if x.off1 == -1 and x.reg1 == reg:
                                    x.off1 = opOffset
                                    if x.off2 != -1:
                                        h.regions.append(OPREGION(1, x.off1, 2, CMDSimpler.heap[j].index, x.off2))
                                        #xlog("PushPop Added")
                                elif x.off2 == -1 and x.reg2 == reg:
                                    x.off2 = opOffset
                                    if x.off1 != -1:
                                        h.regions.append(OPREGION(1, x.off1, 2, CMDSimpler.heap[j].index, x.off2))
                                        #xlog("PushPop Added")
                                else:
                                    xlog("PushPop collision")
                        break

    def DecryptOpcodeSize(self, h):
        lastop = CMDSimpler.Last().instr
        if lastop.mnemonic == UD_Iret:
            h.opcodeSize = OPSZ_RETN
        elif lastop.mnemonic == UD_Ijmp:
            op = CMDSimpler.heap[ CMDSimpler.count - 2 ].instr
            if self.IsVmEipOp(op):
                if op.mnemonic == UD_Isub:
                    h.opcodeSize = OPSZ_SUB
                elif op.mnemonic == UD_Iadd:
                    h.opcodeSize = op.operand[1].lval.lval

    def RecoverHandle(self, h, fdbg = None):
        if not self.RecoverJumpData(h):
            xlog("Error while recover jump data")
            return False

        if not self.RecoverKeyData(h):
            xlog("Error while recover key data")
            return False

        if fdbg != None:
            if CMDSimpler.count > 0:
                fdbg.write("//////////////////////////////////////////////\r\n// FISH Virtual Handler {:04x} {:08x}\r\n".format(h.hndlID, CMDSimpler.heap[0].addr))
                for l in CMDSimpler.GetListing(1, 1):
                    fdbg.write("{}\n".format(l))

        if not self.RecoveryHandler(h):
            if not self.RecoveryAdvancedHandler(h):
                return False

        self.DecryptOpcodeRegions(h)
        self.DecryptOpcodeSize(h)

        #self.RecoveryHandleType(h)

        #if h.tp == -1:
        #    xlog("Error while recover handler type")
        #    return False
        #else:
        #    xlog("Handler {:x}".format(h.tp))

        return True

    def EnumOps(self):
        for i in range(CMDSimpler.count):
            CMDSimpler.heap[i].index = i

    def DeofusHndl(self, i):
        if i not in range(self.iatCount):
            return False

        if i in self.hndl:
            return True

        m = self.GetMM(UINT(self.iatAddr + i * 4))
        haddr = GetDWORD(m)

        hndlAddr = UINT(self.ivmbase + haddr)
        self.DumpHandler(hndlAddr, 1)

        ####
        self.fmach.write("//////////////////////////////////////////////\r\n// FISH Virtual Handler {:04x} {:08x}\r\n".format(i, hndlAddr))
        for l in CMDSimpler.GetListing(1, 1, True):
            self.fmach.write("{}\n".format(l))

        self.EnumOps()

        h = self.HANDLER(i)
        h.c024 = self.compares
        h.code = CMDSimpler.Clone()
        h.dumpAddr = hndlAddr

        if not self.RecoverHandle(h, self.fdmach):
            # time.sleep(1.5)
            pass

        if h.tp != -1:
            xlog(
                "\t{:04x} Handler {:04x} {:08x} {:d}({:d}) {:d}".format(h.tp, i, hndlAddr, h.operands[0].tp,
                                                                        h.operands[0].sz, h.operands[1].tp))
            self.fdmach.write("Handler {:04x}\n".format(h.tp))
        else:
            xlog("\t{:04x} Handler {:04x} {:08x} keys {:d} regions {:d} size {:d}".format(h.tp, i, hndlAddr,
                                                                                           len(h.keys), len(h.regions),
                                                                                           h.opcodeSize))
        # xlog(" " + hex(h.tp))

        self.hndl[i] = h
        self.hndlCount += 1
        return True


    def DeofusVM(self):
        b = GetBytes(UINT(self.VmContext + self.HTableOff), 4)
        if not b:
            return False

        self.ivmbase = GetDWORD(b)
        if self.iatAddr == self.ivmbase:
            self.ivmbase = 0
        else:
            self.ivmbase = self.imageBase

        self.f_6f038 = 0

        xlog("Open out file ", "{}/TXT/Fish_Machine_{:08x}.txt".format(self.WrkDir, self.VMAddr),)

        self.fmach = open("{}/TXT/Fish_Machine_{:08x}.txt".format(self.WrkDir, self.VMAddr), "w")
        self.fdmach = open("{}/TXT/Fish_Machine_dbg_{:08x}.txt".format(self.WrkDir, self.VMAddr), "w")

        return True

        f = open("{}/TXT/Fish_FULL_{:08x}.txt".format(self.WrkDir, self.VMAddr), "w")
        f2 = open("{}/TXT/Fish_FULL_dbg_{:08x}.txt".format(self.WrkDir, self.VMAddr), "w")
        for i in range(self.iatCount):
            m = self.GetMM( UINT(self.iatAddr + i * 4) )
            haddr = GetDWORD(m)

            self.DumpHandler( UINT(self.ivmbase + haddr), 1 )

            ####
            #sys.stdout.write("\tHandler {:04x} {:08x}".format(i, UINT(self.ivmbase + haddr)))
            f.write("//////////////////////////////////////////////\r\n// FISH Virtual Handler {:04x} {:08x}\r\n".format(i, UINT(self.ivmbase + haddr)))
            for l in CMDSimpler.GetListing(1, 1, True):
                f.write("{}\n".format(l))

            self.EnumOps()

            h = self.HANDLER(i)
            h.c024 = self.compares
            h.code = CMDSimpler.Clone()

            if not self.RecoverHandle(h, f2):
                #time.sleep(1.5)
                pass

            if h.tp != -1 :
                xlog("\t{:04x} Handler {:04x} {:08x} {:d}({:d}) {:d}".format(h.tp, i, UINT(self.ivmbase + haddr), h.operands[0].tp, h.operands[0].sz, h.operands[1].tp))
            else:
                xlog("\t{:04x} Handler {:04x} {:08x} keys {:d} regions {:d} size {:d}".format(h.tp, i, UINT(self.ivmbase + haddr), len(h.keys), len(h.regions), h.opcodeSize))
            #xlog(" " + hex(h.tp))

            self.hndl[i] = h
            self.hndlCount += 1
        #exit()
        return True

    def IsFlowHandler(self, h):
        return h.tp in (WH_JMP_INS, WH_JMP_OUT_REG, WH_JMP_OUT_MEM, WH_JMP_OUT_IMM, WH_RET, WH_CALL, WH_UNDEF)

    def StepAdvanced(self, h, reader):
        return False

    def FindFirstKeyAfter(self, h, idx):
        for i in range(len(h.keys)):
            if h.keys[i].idx >= idx:
                return i
        return -1

    def FindLastKeyBefore(self, h, idx):
        i = len(h.keys) - 1
        while i >= 0:
            if h.keys[i].idx <= idx:
                return i
            i -= 1
        return -1

    def StepFlow(self, h, rawOff, skipMutate, dbg = False):
        if skipMutate:
            self.trHid = rawOff & 0xFFFF
            self.trAddr += h.opcodeSize
        else:
            hoff = rawOff

            if h.opcodeSize in (OPSZ_SUB, OPSZ_RETN, OPSZ_INVALID):
                xlog("h.opcodeSize in (OPSZ_SUB, OPSZ_RETN, OPSZ_INVALID) {:x}".format(h.opcodeSize))
                return False

            if len(h.idxList) == 0:
                if h.flowMutateIndex != -1:
                    if dbg:
                        xlog("Flow mutate {:d} {} {:x}, {:x}".format(h.flowMutateIndex, udLookupMnemonic(h.flowMutateMnemonic), hoff, h.flowMutateConst))
                    _, hoff = ComputeVal(h.flowMutateMnemonic, 32, hoff, h.flowMutateConst)
            else:
                c = self.FindFirstKeyAfter(h, h.idxList[0])
                e = self.FindLastKeyBefore(h, h.idxList[-1])

                if c == -1 or e == -1:
                    xlog("c == -1 or e == -1")
                    return False

                fmutate = False
                while c <= e:
                    if h.flowMutateIndex != -1 and not fmutate and h.keys[c].idx > h.flowMutateIndex:
                        if dbg:
                            xlog("Flow mutate {:d} {} {:x}, {:x}".format(h.flowMutateIndex, udLookupMnemonic(h.flowMutateMnemonic), hoff, h.flowMutateConst))
                        _, hoff = ComputeVal(h.flowMutateMnemonic, 32, hoff, h.flowMutateConst)
                        fmutate = True

                    res, hoff = self.PerformHndlKey(h, c, hoff, dbg)
                    if not res:
                        xlog("if not res")
                        return False
                    c += 1

                if h.flowMutateIndex != -1 and not fmutate:
                    if dbg:
                        xlog("Flow mutate {:d} {} {:x}, {:x}".format(h.flowMutateIndex, udLookupMnemonic(h.flowMutateMnemonic), hoff, h.flowMutateConst))
                    _, hoff = ComputeVal(h.flowMutateMnemonic, 32, hoff, h.flowMutateConst)

            self.trHid = hoff & 0xFFFF
            self.trAddr += h.opcodeSize

        xlog("Flow {:x} {:x}\n".format(self.trAddr, self.trHid))
        return True

    def PerformHndlKey(self, h, i, data, dbg = False):
        #dbg = True
        k = h.keys[i]
        # skip perform if condition exist and not satisfed
        if k.condition != None and not k.condition(self, k):
            if dbg:
                xlog("False condition")
            return (True, data)

        if k.dkeyparam:
            if k.tid != UD_OP_REG:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Direct key param type != REG.")
                return (False, data)
            srcKeyData = self.GetKey(k.parameter)
            if srcKeyData == None:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Could not get key data from source key.")
                return (False, data)
            dstKeyData = self.GetKey(k.keyId)
            if srcKeyData == None:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Could not get key data from destination key.")
                return (False, data)

            if dbg:
                xlog("VM[ {:x} ] ({:x})  {}:{:d}  VM[ {:x} ] ({:x})".format(k.keyId, dstKeyData,  udLookupMnemonic(k.mnemonic), k.sz,   k.parameter, srcKeyData ))
            _,dstKeyData = ComputeVal(k.mnemonic, k.sz, dstKeyData, srcKeyData)

            if not self.SetKey(k.keyId, dstKeyData):
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Could not set key data for destination key.")
                return (False, data)
        elif k.operand > 0:
            if k.tid != UD_OP_REG:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Indirect key type != REG.")
                return (False, data)
            keyData = self.GetKey(k.keyId)
            if keyData == None:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] k.operand Could not get data from key.  (keyId {:d})".format(k.keyId))
                return (False, data)

            if dbg:
                xlog(".. {}:{:d}   {:x}   {:x} ({:x})".format(udLookupMnemonic(k.mnemonic), k.sz, data, k.keyId, keyData))
            _, data = ComputeVal(k.mnemonic, k.sz, data, keyData)
        elif k.tid == UD_OP_IMM:
            keyData = self.GetKey(k.keyId)
            if keyData == None:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] TID_VAL Could not get data from key.")
                return (False, data)

            if dbg:
                xlog("VM[ {:x} ({:x}) ]  {}:{:d}  {:x}".format(k.keyId, keyData,  udLookupMnemonic(k.mnemonic), k.sz,   k.parameter))
            _, keyData = ComputeVal(k.mnemonic, k.sz, keyData, k.parameter)

            if not self.SetKey(k.keyId, keyData):
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Could not set data for key.")
                return (False, data)
        else:
            if k.tid != UD_OP_REG:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Accessor key type != REG.")
                return (False, data)
            keyData = self.GetKey(k.keyId)
            if keyData == None:
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] else TID_REG Could not get data from key.")
                return (False, data)

            if dbg:
                xlog("VM[ {:x} ({:x}) ]  {}:{:d}  {:x}".format(k.keyId, keyData, udLookupMnemonic(k.mnemonic), k.sz, data))
            _, keyData = ComputeVal(k.mnemonic, k.sz, keyData, data)
            if not self.SetKey(k.keyId, keyData):
                xlog("[CodeDevirtualizer] Could not set data for key.")
                return (False, data)
        return (True, data)


    def PerformKeySeq(self, h, bix, eix, data, dbg = False):
        c = self.FindFirstKeyAfter(h, bix)
        e = self.FindLastKeyBefore(h, eix)
        if c == -1 or e == -1:
            return (False, data)

        while c <= e:
            if dbg:
                xlog("Perform {:d}".format(h.keys[c].idx))
            (res, data) = self.PerformHndlKey(h, c, data, dbg)
            if res == False:
                return (False, data)
            c += 1
        return (True, data)

    def StepOpcodeRegions(self, h, reader, dbg = False):
        keyData = 0
        if len(h.regions) == 0:
            _, keyData = self.PerformKeySeq(h, 0, h.flowDataIndex, keyData)
        else:
            if len(h.keys) > 0 and h.keys[0].idx < h.regions[0].indexStart:
                if dbg:
                    xlog("PRESTEP Region:  {:d}-{:d}".format( 0, h.regions[0].indexStart - 1))
                _, keyData = self.PerformKeySeq(h, 0, h.regions[0].indexStart - 1, keyData, dbg)

            for i in range(len(h.regions)):
                r = h.regions[i]
                if r.tp == 0:
                    keyData = 0
                    if r.opcodeSize == 8:
                        keyData = reader.Read1(r.opcodeOffset)
                    elif r.opcodeSize == 16:
                        keyData = reader.Read2(r.opcodeOffset)
                    elif r.opcodeSize == 32:
                        keyData = reader.Read4(r.opcodeOffset)
                    elif r.opcodeSize == 64:
                        keyData = reader.Read8(r.opcodeOffset)
                elif r.tp == 1:
                    reg1 = reader.Read2(r.opcodeOffset)
                    reg2 = reader.Read2(r.indexEnd)
                    rv1 = self.GetVMReg(reg1)
                    rv2 = self.GetVMReg(reg2)
                    if self.traceLog:
                        xlog("VMXCHG: VM[{:x}] ({:x}) <=> VM[{:x}] ({:x})".format(reg1, rv1, reg2, rv2))
                    self.vmReg[reg1] = rv2
                    self.vmReg[reg2] = rv1

                indexEnd = 0
                if (i + 1) < len(h.regions):
                    indexEnd = h.regions[i + 1].indexStart
                else:
                    indexEnd = h.flowReadIndex

                if dbg:
                    xlog("Step Region: {:x}  {:x}    {:d}({:d})-{:d}".format(r.opcodeOffset, keyData, r.indexStart, r.indexEnd, indexEnd - 1))

                _, keyData = self.PerformKeySeq(h, r.indexStart, indexEnd - 1, keyData, dbg)
        return True


    def StepStoreStack(self, h, reader):
        regid = reader.Read2(h.opcodeOffsets[0])
        self.vmReg[regid] = UD_R_FAMILY_SP #ESP

        self.step_params[0] = "STORE STACK"
        self.step_params[1] = regid

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = WOP_SSTACK

        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_REG
        rk.operand[0].size = self.bits
        rk.operand[0].base = self.ConvRegSize(regid, self.bits)

        #if self.vmEspReg == -1:
        self.vmEspReg = regid
        self.realRegs.add(regid)

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return  self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), True)

    def StepLoadStack(self, h, reader):
        regid = reader.Read2(h.opcodeOffsets[0])

        self.step_params[0] = "LOAD STACK"
        self.step_params[1] = regid

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = WOP_LSTACK

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return  self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepReset(self, h, reader):
        self.ResetKeyData()

        self.step_params[0] = "RESET"

        #self.trStkReg = 7
        #self.realRegs.clear()
        #self.vmEspReg = -1

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = WOP_RESET

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), True)

    def StepPushF(self, h, reader):
        self.StepOpcodeRegions(h, reader)

        self.step_params[0] = "PUSHFD"

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = UD_Ipushfd

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepPopF(self, h, reader):
        self.StepOpcodeRegions(h, reader)

        self.step_params[0] = "POPFD"

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = UD_Ipopfd

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepRestoreStack(self, h, reader):
        val = reader.Read1(h.opcodeOffsets[0])

        self.step_params[0] = "RESTORE STACK"
        self.step_params[1] = val

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = WOP_RSTACK
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[0].size = self.bits
        rk.operand[0].lval.lval = val

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepStos(self, h, reader):
        self.StepOpcodeRegions(h, reader)

        self.step_params[0] = "STOS"

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = {WH_STOSB : UD_Istosb, WH_STOSW : UD_Istosw, WH_STOSD : UD_Istosw}[h.tp]
        #rk.operand[0].ID =

        xlog("STOS")
        exit(1)
        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepCrypt(self, h, reader):
        regid = reader.Read2(h.opcodeOffsets[0])
        val = h.opcodeOffsets[1]

        self.step_params[0] = "CRYPT"
        self.step_params[1] = regid
        self.step_params[2] = val

        bts = GetBytes(self.VmContext + val, 4)
        val = GetDWORD(bts)

        self.step_params[3] = val

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = WOP_CRYPT
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_REG
        rk.operand[0].size = self.bits
        rk.operand[0].base = udFamilyReg(self.GetVMReg(regid), self.bits)
        rk.operand[1].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[1].size = 32
        rk.operand[1].lval.lval = val

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepJccIns(self, h, reader):
        jccid = reader.Read1(h.opcodeOffsets[0])
        hid = reader.Read2(h.opcodeOffsets[1])
        distance = reader.Read4(h.opcodeOffsets[2])

        if distance & 0x80000000:
            distance = -(distance & 0x7FFFFFFF)

        self.step_params[0] = "JCC_INS"
        self.step_params[1] = jccid
        self.step_params[2] = hid
        self.step_params[3] = distance

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = self.GetJccMnem(jccid)
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[0].size = 32
        rk.operand[0].lval.lval = distance

        l = LABELS.GetLabel( UDWORD(self.trAddr + distance), hid )
        l.specialData = (self.vmReg.copy(), self.realRegs.copy(), self.vmEspReg)

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepJccOut(self, h, reader):
        jccid = reader.Read1(h.opcodeOffsets[0])
        offset = reader.Read4(h.opcodeOffsets[1])

        self.step_params[0] = "JCC_OUT"
        self.step_params[1] = jccid
        self.step_params[2] = offset

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = self.GetJccMnem(jccid)
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[0].size = 32
        rk.operand[0].lval.lval = UDWORD(offset + self.imageBase)

        #LABELS.GetLabel( UINT(self.trAddr + distance), hid )

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return self.StepFlow(h, reader.Read2(h.flowReadOffset), False)

    def StepJmpOutImm(self, h, reader):
        offset = reader.Read4(h.opcodeOffsets[0])

        self.step_params[0] = "JMP_OUT_IMM"
        self.step_params[1] = offset

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = UD_Ijmp
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[0].size = 32
        rk.operand[0].lval.lval = UDWORD(offset + self.imageBase)

        #LABELS.GetLabel( UINT(self.trAddr + distance), hid )

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return True

    def StepJmpIns(self, h, reader):
        hid = reader.Read2(h.opcodeOffsets[0])
        distance = reader.Read4(h.opcodeOffsets[1])

        if distance & 0x80000000:
            distance = -(distance & 0x7FFFFFFF)

        self.step_params[0] = "JMP_INS"
        self.step_params[1] = hid
        self.step_params[2] = distance

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = UD_Ijmp
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[0].size = 32
        rk.operand[0].lval.lval = distance

        l = LABELS.GetLabel( UINT(self.trAddr + distance), hid )
        l.specialData = (self.vmReg.copy(), self.realRegs.copy(), self.vmEspReg)

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return True

    def StepUndef(self, h, reader):
        tp = reader.Read1(h.opcodeOffsets[0])
        retaddr = reader.Read4(h.opcodeOffsets[1])

        self.step_params[0] = "UNDEF"
        self.step_params[1] = tp
        self.step_params[2] = retaddr

        retaddr = UINT(self.imageBase + retaddr)

        rk = ud()
        rk.addr = h.hndlID
        rk.mnemonic = WOP_UNDEF
        rk.operand[0].type = UD_OP_IMM
        rk.operand[0].size = 32
        rk.operand[0].lval.lval = retaddr

        mm = self.GetMM(retaddr)
        urk = ud(dis_mode = self.bits)
        urk.setBuf(mm)
        urk.decode()

        cont, p1, p2 = self.CheckEnterVM(retaddr + urk.inp_ctr)
        if cont:
            l = LABELS.GetLabel(UINT(self.imageBase + p1), p2)
            rk.operand[1].type = UD_OP_IMM
            rk.operand[1].size = 32
            rk.operand[1].lval.lval = l.addr

        self.traced.Add(rk, self.trAddr)
        return True

    def StepHandler(self, h, reader):
        if h.tp == WH_STORE_STK:
            return self.StepStoreStack(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_RESTORE_STK:
            return self.StepRestoreStack(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_LOAD_STK:
            return self.StepLoadStack(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_RESET:
            return self.StepReset(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_PUSHFD:
            return self.StepPushF(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_POPFD:
            return self.StepPopF(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_CRYPT:
            return self.StepCrypt(h, reader)
        elif h.tp in (WH_STOSB, WH_STOSW, WH_STOSD):
            return self.StepStos(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_JCC_INS:
            return self.StepJccIns(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_JMP_INS:
            return self.StepJmpIns(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_JCC_OUT:
            return self.StepJccOut(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_JMP_OUT_IMM:
            return self.StepJmpOutImm(h, reader)
        elif h.tp == WH_UNDEF:
            return self.StepUndef(h, reader)

        return self.StepAdvanced(h, reader)

    def ProcessVirtualPointer(self, l):
        self.trHid = l.pushVal
        self.trAddr = l.addr
        if l.specialData != None:
            self.vmEspReg = l.specialData[2]
            self.vmReg = l.specialData[0].copy()
            self.realRegs = l.specialData[1].copy()
        else:
            self.ResetInputStack()
        while True:
            if self.trAddr in LABELS.proceed:
                xlog("{:08x} hndl {:04x} already proceeded. break.".format(self.trAddr, self.trHid))
                break

            LABELS.proceed[self.trAddr] = self.trHid

            #xlog("{:08x} hndl {:04x}".format(self.trAddr, self.trHid))

            if self.trHid not in self.hndl and not self.DeofusHndl(self.trHid):
                xlog("Error deoufus hndl {:04x}".format(self.trHid))
                return False

            rdr = READER(self, self.trAddr)

            self.step_params[0] = None

            h = self.hndl[self.trHid]
            xlog("{:08x} hndl {:04x} ( {:x}  {:x}  size {:x})".format(self.trAddr, self.trHid, h.tp, h.dumpAddr, h.opcodeSize))

            kks = ""
            for kk in self.Keys:
                kks += "{:x}:{:x}  ".format(kk.Offset, kk.Data)
            xlog(kks)

            kks = ""
            for rrg in self.realRegs:
                kks += "{:x}:{:x} ".format(rrg, self.GetVMReg(rrg))
            xlog(kks)

            if not self.StepHandler(h, rdr):
                xlog("Not stepped")
                return False

            if self.step_params[0] != None:
                xlog(self.step_params[0])
                xlog("")

            if self.IsFlowHandler(h):
                break

        return True

    def Trace(self):
        LABELS.Init()
        LABELS.GetLabel(self.push1_2, self.push2)

        self.traced = InsList()
        self.traced.Clear()
        self.step_params = dict()
        self.ResetInputStack()
        succ = True

        while True:
            l = LABELS.GetNextToProceed()
            if not l:
                break

            l.proceed = 1

            xlog("\nLABEL at {:08x} {:04x}\n".format(l.addr, l.pushVal))

            if not self.ProcessVirtualPointer(l):
                succ = False
                break

        self.traced.SortByAddr()
        self.Simplify(self.traced)

        for l in self.GetWildListing(self.traced, True, True, True):
            xlog(l)

        return succ
        #for l in self.traced.GetListing(1, 1, True, True):
        #    xlog("{}".format(l))

    def GetWildListing(self, oplist, index = False, addr = False, labels = False):
        lableList = list()
        for l in LABELS.arr:
            if l.used:
                lableList.append(l.addr)
        lableList.sort(reverse=True)

        lst = list()
        for i in range(oplist.count):
            if len(lableList) and labels:
                while len(lableList) and lableList[-1] <= oplist.heap[i].addr:
                    lb = lableList.pop()
                    lst.append("LABEL_{:x}:".format(lb))
            op = oplist.heap[i].instr
            t = ""
            if index:
                t += "{:d}\t ".format(i)
            if addr:
                t += "{:08x}\t ".format(oplist.heap[i].addr)
            t += self.TxtWop(op)

            if op.mnemonic in JCC_LIST or op.mnemonic == UD_Ijmp and \
                op.operand[0].type == UD_OP_IMM:
                aaadr = op.operand[0].lval.lval
                if op.operand[0].lval.lval <= 0xFFFFFF:
                    aaadr = UDWORD(oplist.heap[i].addr + op.operand[0].lval.lval)
                if self.InBlock(aaadr):
                    t += " \t ( {:08x} )".format(aaadr)

            lst.append(t)
        return lst

    def GetVMReg(self, rid):
        if rid in self.vmReg:
            return self.vmReg[rid]
        return 0xFFFFFFFF

    def GetJccMnem(self, id):
        if id in self.jccMnemonicTypes:
            return self.jccMnemonicTypes[id]
        return OP_NONE

    def CheckEnterVM(self, addr):
        m = self.GetMM(addr)
        if m == None:
            return (False, 0, 0)

        rk1 = ud()
        rk1.setBuf(m)
        rk1.decode()
        if rk1.mnemonic != UD_Ipush:
            return (False, 0, 0)

        m = m[rk1.inp_ctr:]
        rk2 = ud()
        rk2.setBuf(m)
        rk2.decode()
        if rk2.mnemonic != UD_Ipush:
            return (False, 0, 0)
        m = m[rk2.inp_ctr:]
        rk3 = ud()
        rk3.setBuf(m)
        rk3.decode()
        if rk3.mnemonic != UD_Ijmp:
            return (False, 0, 0)
        return (True, rk1.operand[0].lval.udword, rk2.operand[0].lval.udword)

    def VMRegOper(self, op):
        return (op.base >> 4) & 0xFF

    def TxtWopOperand(self, opr, islea = False):
        if opr.type == UD_OP_REG:
            if opr.base & 0xFFF0 == 0x1040:
                return "VM_ESP"
            elif opr.base & 0x2000:
                if opr.size == self.bits:
                    return "R_V{:x}".format(self.VMRegOper(opr))
                if opr.size == 8:
                    return "R_V{:x}b".format(self.VMRegOper(opr))
                elif opr.size == 16:
                    return "R_V{:x}w".format(self.VMRegOper(opr))
                elif opr.size == 32:
                    return "R_V{:x}d".format(self.VMRegOper(opr))
                elif opr.size == 64:
                    return "R_V{:x}q".format(self.VMRegOper(opr))
            else:
                return udFamilyRegName(opr.Family(), opr.size)
        elif opr.type == UD_OP_IMM:
            return "0x{:x}".format(opr.getVal())
        elif opr.type == UD_OP_MEM:
            if False and opr.lval.lval == 0 and opr.base != UD_NONE:
                t = ""
                if islea:
                    t = "["
                else:
                    if opr.size == 8:
                        t = "byte ptr ["
                    elif opr.size == 16:
                        t = "word ptr ["
                    elif opr.size == 32:
                        t = "dword ptr ["
                    elif opr.size == 64:
                        t = "qword ptr ["

                if opr.base & 0xFFF0 == 0x1040:
                    return t + "VM_ESP]"
                elif opr.base & 0x2000:
                    return t + "R_V{:x}]".format(self.VMRegOper(opr))
                else:
                    return t + udRegName(opr.base) + "]"
            else:

                sz = opr.size
                t = ""
                if not islea:
                    t = {8: "byte ptr ", 16: "word ptr ", 32: "dword ptr ", 64: "qword ptr "}[sz]
                t += "["

                if opr.base != UD_NONE:
                    t += udRegName(opr.base)

                if opr.index != UD_NONE:
                    if opr.base != UD_NONE:
                        t += "+"
                    t += udRegName(opr.index)

                    t += {0: "*1", 1: "*1", 2: "*2", 4: "*4", 8: "*8"}[opr.scale]


                if opr.lval.lval != 0 or (opr.base == UD_NONE and opr.index == UD_NONE):
                    if opr.base != UD_NONE or opr.index != UD_NONE:
                        t += "+"
                    t += "0x{:x}".format(opr.lval.lval)
                t += "]"
                return t
        return "UNK"

    def TxtWildOperator(self, op):
        if op.mnemonic in WILD_OPTXT:
            return WILD_OPTXT[op.mnemonic]
        return ""

    def TxtWop(self, op):
        t = ""
        if op.mnemonic >= 0x1000:
            t = self.TxtWildOperator(op)
        else:
            t = udLookupMnemonic(op.mnemonic).upper()
        if op.operand[0].type != UD_NONE:
            t += " " + self.TxtWopOperand(op.operand[0])

        if op.operand[1].type != UD_NONE:
            t += ", " + self.TxtWopOperand(op.operand[1], op.mnemonic == UD_Ilea)
        return t

    def ConvReg(self, offset):
        if offset in self.realRegs:
            return self.GetVMReg(offset)
        if self.vmEspReg != -1 and offset == self.vmEspReg:
            return 0x104
        return 0x200 | offset

    def ConvRegSize(self, offset, size):
        if offset in self.realRegs:
            if self.GetVMReg(offset) == 0xFFFFFFFF:
                return -1
            return udFamilyReg( self.GetVMReg(offset), size )
        if self.vmEspReg != -1 and offset == self.vmEspReg:
            return 0x1040 | (size >> 3)
        return 0x2000 | (offset << 8) | (size >> 3)

    def Simplify(self, trace):
        pass

    def ResetInputStack(self):
        if self.bits == 32:
            self.trStkReg = (UD_R_FAMILY_DI, UD_R_FAMILY_SI, UD_R_FAMILY_BP, UD_R_FAMILY_SP,
                             UD_R_FAMILY_B, UD_R_FAMILY_D, UD_R_FAMILY_C, UD_R_FAMILY_A)
```

`new/udis86.py`:

```py
from udis86_decode import *

def udLookupMnemonic(c):
    if (c < UD_MAX_MNEMONIC_CODE):
        return ud_mnemonics_str[c]
    else:
        return ""
```

`new/udis86_decode.py`:

```py
from udis86_decodeh import *
from udis86_itabh import *
from udis86_itabc import *
from udis86_types import *
from udis86_types import UD_NONE

MAX_PREFIXES =   15

def REX_W(r):
    return ( ( 0xF & ( r ) )  >> 3 )

def REX_R(r):
    return( ( 0x7 & ( r ) )  >> 2 )

def REX_X(r):
    return ( ( 0x3 & ( r ) )  >> 1 )

def REX_B(r):
    return ( ( 0x1 & ( r ) )  >> 0 )

def REX_PFX_MASK(n):
    return ( ( P_REXW(n) << 3 ) |
             ( P_REXR(n) << 2 ) |
             ( P_REXX(n) << 1 ) |
             ( P_REXB(n) << 0 ) )

def SIB_S(b):
    return ( ( b ) >> 6 )

def SIB_I(b):
    return ( ( ( b ) >> 3 ) & 7 )

def SIB_B(b):
    return ( ( b ) & 7 )

def MODRM_REG(b):
    return ( ( ( b ) >> 3 ) & 7 )

def MODRM_NNN(b):
    return ( ( ( b ) >> 3 ) & 7 )

def MODRM_MOD(b):
    return ( ( ( b ) >> 6 ) & 3 )

def MODRM_RM(b):
    return ( ( b ) & 7 )


REGCLASS_GPR = 0
REGCLASS_MMX = 1
REGCLASS_CR = 2
REGCLASS_DB = 3
REGCLASS_SEG = 4
REGCLASS_XMM = 5




UD_R_FAMILY_NONE = 0
UD_R_FAMILY_A = 1
UD_R_FAMILY_C = 2
UD_R_FAMILY_D = 3
UD_R_FAMILY_B = 4
UD_R_FAMILY_SP = 5
UD_R_FAMILY_BP = 6
UD_R_FAMILY_SI = 7
UD_R_FAMILY_DI = 8
UD_R_FAMILY_8 = 9
UD_R_FAMILY_9 = 10
UD_R_FAMILY_10 = 11
UD_R_FAMILY_11 = 12
UD_R_FAMILY_12 = 13
UD_R_FAMILY_13 = 14
UD_R_FAMILY_14 = 15
UD_R_FAMILY_15 = 16

UD_R_NONE_FAMILY = (UD_NONE, UD_NONE, UD_NONE, UD_NONE) #0
UD_R_A_FAMILY = (UD_R_AL, UD_R_AH, UD_R_AX, UD_R_EAX, UD_R_RAX) #1
UD_R_C_FAMILY = (UD_R_CL, UD_R_CH, UD_R_CX, UD_R_ECX, UD_R_RCX) #2
UD_R_D_FAMILY = (UD_R_DL, UD_R_DH, UD_R_DX, UD_R_EDX, UD_R_RDX) #3
UD_R_B_FAMILY = (UD_R_BL, UD_R_BH, UD_R_BX, UD_R_EBX, UD_R_RBX) #4
UD_R_SP_FAMILY = (UD_R_SPL, UD_R_SP, UD_R_ESP, UD_R_RSP) #5
UD_R_BP_FAMILY = (UD_R_BPL, UD_R_BP, UD_R_EBP, UD_R_RBP) #6
UD_R_SI_FAMILY = (UD_R_SIL, UD_R_SI, UD_R_ESI, UD_R_RSI) #7
UD_R_DI_FAMILY = (UD_R_DIL, UD_R_DI, UD_R_EDI, UD_R_RDI) #8
UD_R_8_FAMILY = (UD_R_R8B, UD_R_R8W, UD_R_R8D, UD_R_R8) #9
UD_R_9_FAMILY = (UD_R_R9B, UD_R_R9W, UD_R_R9D, UD_R_R9) #10
UD_R_10_FAMILY = (UD_R_R10B, UD_R_R10W, UD_R_R10D, UD_R_R10) #11
UD_R_11_FAMILY = (UD_R_R11B, UD_R_R11W, UD_R_R11D, UD_R_R11) #12
UD_R_12_FAMILY = (UD_R_R12B, UD_R_R12W, UD_R_R12D, UD_R_R12) #13
UD_R_13_FAMILY = (UD_R_R13B, UD_R_R13W, UD_R_R13D, UD_R_R13) #14
UD_R_14_FAMILY = (UD_R_R14B, UD_R_R14W, UD_R_R14D, UD_R_R14) #15
UD_R_15_FAMILY = (UD_R_R15B, UD_R_R15W, UD_R_R15D, UD_R_R15) #16



UD_R_FAMILIES = ( UD_R_NONE_FAMILY, UD_R_A_FAMILY, UD_R_C_FAMILY, UD_R_D_FAMILY, UD_R_B_FAMILY,
                 UD_R_SP_FAMILY, UD_R_BP_FAMILY, UD_R_SI_FAMILY, UD_R_DI_FAMILY,
                 UD_R_8_FAMILY, UD_R_9_FAMILY, UD_R_10_FAMILY, UD_R_11_FAMILY,
                 UD_R_12_FAMILY, UD_R_13_FAMILY, UD_R_14_FAMILY, UD_R_15_FAMILY )

UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP = dict()

for i, f in enumerate(UD_R_FAMILIES):
    for r in f:
        UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP[r] = i



def udBaseFamily(base):
    return UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(base, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE)

def udResizeBase(base, newSize):
    f = UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(base, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE)
    sz = 0
    if f in (UD_R_FAMILY_A, UD_R_FAMILY_C, UD_R_FAMILY_D, UD_R_FAMILY_B):
        sz = {8: 0, 16: 2, 32: 3, 64: 4}[newSize]
    else:
        sz = {8: 0, 16: 1, 32: 2, 64: 3}[newSize]
    return UD_R_FAMILIES[f][sz]

def udFamilyReg(family, size):
    if family in (UD_R_FAMILY_A, UD_R_FAMILY_C, UD_R_FAMILY_D, UD_R_FAMILY_B):
        size = {8: 0, 16: 2, 32: 3, 64: 4}[size]
    else:
        size = {8: 0, 16: 1, 32: 2, 64: 3}[size]
    return UD_R_FAMILIES[family][size]

class ud_operand:
    type = UD_NONE
    size = 0
    base = 0
    index = 0
    scale = 0
    offset = 0
    lval = 0

    _oprcode = 0

    def __init__(self):
        self.lval = ud_lval()

    def Copy(self):
        tmp = ud_operand()
        tmp.type = self.type
        tmp.size = self.size
        tmp.base = self.base
        tmp.index = self.index
        tmp.scale = self.scale
        tmp.offset = self.offset
        tmp.lval.lval = self.lval.lval
        tmp._oprcode = self._oprcode
        return tmp

    def isSreg(self):
        return self.type == UD_OP_REG and self.base >= UD_R_ES and self.base <= UD_R_GS

    def isSame(self, opr):
        return self.type == opr.type and self.size == opr.size and \
               self.base == opr.base and self.index == opr.index and \
               self.scale == opr.scale and self.offset == opr.offset and\
               self.lval.lval == opr.lval.lval

    #is same base index scale offset
    def isSameBISO(self, opr):
        return self.base == opr.base and self.index == opr.index and self.scale == opr.scale and self.lval.udword == opr.lval.udword

    def getVal(self, signed = False):
        return self.lval.GetVal(self.size, signed)

    def isBaseFamily(self, reg):
        if type(reg) in (list, tuple):
            sfamily = UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(self.base, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE)
            for r in reg:
                if sfamily == UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(r, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE):
                    return True
            return False
        else:
            return UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(self.base, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE) == UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(reg, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE)

    def getBaseHigh(self):
        famid = UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(self.base, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE)
        if famid in (UD_R_FAMILY_A, UD_R_FAMILY_C, UD_R_FAMILY_D, UD_R_FAMILY_B):
            return (UD_R_AH, UD_R_CH, UD_R_DH, UD_R_BH)[famid]
        return UD_NONE


    def BIS(self):
        return (self.base, self.index, self.scale)

    def BISO(self):
        return (self.base, self.index, self.scale, self.lval.lval)

    def TSZ(self):
        return (self.type, self.size)

    def Family(self):
        return UD_R_FAMILY_LOOKUP.get(self.base, UD_R_FAMILY_NONE)

    def CopyValues(self, op):
        self.type = op.type
        self.size = op.size
        self.base = op.base
        self.index = op.index
        self.scale = op.scale
        self.offset = op.offset
        self.lval.lval = op.lval.lval


class ud:
    dis_mode = 0
    pc = 0
    vendor = 0
    mnemonic = UD_Inone
    operand = None

    inp_end = True
    inp_buf = None
    inp_buf_index = 0
    inp_peek = 0

    inp_ctr = 0
    inp_curr = 0
    inp_sess = None

    inp_hook = None

    error = 0
    errMsg = ""

    pfx_rex = 0
    pfx_seg = 0
    pfx_opr = 0
    pfx_adr = 0
    pfx_lock = 0
    pfx_str = 0
    pfx_rep = 0
    pfx_repe = 0
    pfx_repne = 0

    opr_mode = 0
    adr_mode = 0
    br_far = 0
    br_near = 0
    have_modrm = False
    modrm = 0
    modrm_offset = 0
    vex_op = 0
    vex_b1 = 0
    vex_b2 = 0
    primary_opcode = 0

    itab_entry = None
    le = None

    insn_offset = 0
    asm_buf = ""
    sym_resolver = None


    def __init__(self, dis_mode = 32):
        self.operand = [ud_operand(), ud_operand(), ud_operand(), ud_operand()]
        self.inp_sess = [0] * 64
        self.dis_mode = dis_mode

    def Copy(self):
        tmp = ud()
        tmp.dis_mode = self.dis_mode
        tmp.pc = self.pc
        tmp.vendor = self.vendor
        tmp.mnemonic = self.mnemonic
        tmp.operand[0] = self.operand[0].Copy()
        tmp.operand[1] = self.operand[1].Copy()
        tmp.operand[2] = self.operand[2].Copy()
        tmp.operand[3] = self.operand[3].Copy()
        tmp.inp_end = self.inp_end
        tmp.inp_buf = self.inp_buf
        tmp.inp_buf_index = self.inp_buf_index
        tmp.inp_peek = self.inp_peek

        tmp.inp_ctr = self.inp_ctr
        tmp.inp_curr = self.inp_curr
        tmp.inp_sess = self.inp_sess

        tmp.inp_hook = self.inp_hook

        tmp.error = self.error
        tmp.errMsg = self.errMsg

        tmp.pfx_rex = self.pfx_rex
        tmp.pfx_seg = self.pfx_seg
        tmp.pfx_opr = self.pfx_opr
        tmp.pfx_adr = self.pfx_adr
        tmp.pfx_lock = self.pfx_lock
        tmp.pfx_str = self.pfx_str
        tmp.pfx_rep = self.pfx_rep
        tmp.pfx_repe = self.pfx_repe
        tmp.pfx_repne = self.pfx_repne

        tmp.opr_mode = self.opr_mode
        tmp.adr_mode = self.adr_mode
        tmp.br_far = self.br_far
        tmp.br_near = self.br_near
        tmp.have_modrm = self.have_modrm
        tmp.modrm = self.modrm
        tmp.modrm_offset = self.modrm_offset
        tmp.vex_op = self.vex_op
        tmp.vex_b1 = self.vex_b1
        tmp.vex_b2 = self.vex_b2
        tmp.primary_opcode = self.primary_opcode

        tmp.itab_entry = self.itab_entry
        tmp.le = self.le

        tmp.insn_offset = self.insn_offset
        tmp.asm_buf = self.asm_buf
        tmp.sym_resolver = self.sym_resolver
        return tmp

    def CopyPrefixes(self, u):
        self.pfx_rex = u.pfx_rex
        self.pfx_seg = u.pfx_seg
        self.pfx_opr = u.pfx_opr
        self.pfx_adr = u.pfx_adr
        self.pfx_lock = u.pfx_lock
        self.pfx_str = u.pfx_str
        self.pfx_rep = u.pfx_rep
        self.pfx_repe = u.pfx_repe
        self.pfx_repne = u.pfx_repne

    def UDERR(self, m):
        if self.error == 0:
            self.errMsg = m
            self.error = 1
            print(m)
        return 1

    def inpStart(self):
        self.inp_ctr = 0

    def inpPeek(self):
        if self.inp_end == False:
            if self.inp_buf != None:
                if self.inp_buf_index < len(self.inp_buf):
                    return self.inp_buf[self.inp_buf_index]
            elif self.inp_peek != UD_EOI:
                return self.inp_peek
            else:
                c = self.inp_hook(self)
                if c != UD_EOI:
                    self.inp_peek = c
                    return c
        self.inp_end = True
        self.UDERR("byte expected, eoi received")
        return 0

    def inpNext(self):
        if self.inp_end == False:
            if self.inp_buf != None:
                if self.inp_buf_index < len(self.inp_buf):
                    self.inp_ctr += 1
                    self.inp_curr = self.inp_buf[self.inp_buf_index]
                    self.inp_buf_index += 1
                    return self.inp_curr
            else:
                c = self.inp_peek
                if c == UD_EOI:
                    c = self.inp_hook(self)
                if c != UD_EOI:
                    self.inp_peek = UD_EOI
                    self.inp_curr = c
                    self.inp_sess[self.inp_ctr] = c
                    self.inp_ctr += 1
                    return c
        self.inp_end = True
        self.UDERR("byte expected, eoi received")
        return 0

    def inpCurr(self):
        return self.inp_curr

    def inpUint8(self):
        return self.inpNext()

    def inpUint16(self):
        a = self.inpNext()
        b = self.inpNext()
        return a | (b << 8)

    def inpUint32(self):
        v = 0
        for i in range(4):
            v |= self.inpNext() << (i * 8)
        return v

    def inpUint64(self):
        v = 0
        for i in range(8):
            v |= self.inpNext() << (i * 8)
        return v

    @staticmethod
    def effOprMode(dis_mode, rex_w, pfx_opr):
        if dis_mode == 64:
            if rex_w:
                return 64
            if pfx_opr:
                return 16
            return 32
        elif dis_mode == 32:
            if pfx_opr:
                return 16
            return 32
        else:
            if dis_mode != 16:
                print("effOprMode dis_mode != 16")
                raise Exception
            if pfx_opr:
                return 32
            return 16

    @staticmethod
    def effAdrMode(dis_mode , pfx_adr):
        if dis_mode == 64:
            if pfx_adr:
                return 32
            return 64
        elif dis_mode == 32:
            if pfx_adr:
                return 16
            return 32
        else:
            if dis_mode != 16:
                print("eff_adr_mode dis_mode != 16")
                raise Exception
            if pfx_adr:
                return 32
            return 16

    def decodePrefixes(self):
        done = 0
        curr = 0
        last = 0

        if self.error != 0:
            return self.error

        if self.inp_ctr >= MAX_INSN_LENGTH:
            return self.UDERR("max instruction length")

        while done == 0:
            last = curr
            curr = self.inpNext()

            if self.error != 0:
                return self.error

            if self.inp_ctr >= MAX_INSN_LENGTH:
                return self.UDERR("max instruction length")

            if curr == 0x2e:
                self.pfx_seg = UD_R_CS
            elif curr == 0x36:
                self.pfx_seg = UD_R_SS
            elif curr == 0x3e:
                self.pfx_seg = UD_R_DS
            elif curr == 0x26:
                self.pfx_seg = UD_R_ES
            elif curr == 0x64:
                self.pfx_seg = UD_R_FS
            elif curr == 0x65:
                self.pfx_seg = UD_R_GS
            elif curr == 0x67:
                self.pfx_adr = 0x67
            elif curr == 0xf0:
                self.pfx_lock = 0xf0
            elif curr == 0x66:
                self.pfx_opr = 0x66
            elif curr == 0xf2:
                self.pfx_str = 0xf2
            elif curr == 0xf3:
                self.pfx_str = 0xf3
            else:
                done = 1
                if self.dis_mode == 64 and (curr & 0xf0) == 0x40:
                    done = 0

        if self.dis_mode == 64 and (last & 0xf0) == 0x40:
            self.pfx_rex = last
        return 0

    def vex_l(self):
        if self.vex_op == 0:
            print("u->vex_op != 0")
            raise Exception
        if self.vex_op == 0xc4:
            return (self.vex_b2 >> 2) & 1
        else:
            return (self.vex_b1 >> 2) & 1

    def vex_w(self):
        if self.vex_op == 0:
            print("u->vex_op != 0")
            raise Exception
        if self.vex_op == 0xc4:
            return (self.vex_b2 >> 7) & 1
        else:
            return 0

    def modRm(self):
        if (not self.have_modrm):
            self.modrm = self.inpNext()
            self.modrm_offset = self.inp_ctr - 1
            self.have_modrm = True
        return self.modrm

    def resolveOperandSize(self, osize):
        if osize == SZ_V:
            return self.opr_mode
        elif osize == SZ_Z:
            if self.opr_mode == 16:
                return 16
            return 32
        elif osize == SZ_Y:
            if self.opr_mode == 16:
                return 32
            return self.opr_mode
        elif osize == SZ_RDQ:
            if self.dis_mode == 64:
                return 64
            return 32
        elif osize == SZ_X:
            if self.vex_op == 0:
                print("u->vex_op != 0")
                raise Exception
            if P_VEXL(self.itab_entry.prefix) and self.vex_l():
                return SZ_QQ
            return SZ_DQ
        return osize

    def resolveMnemonic(self):
        if self.mnemonic == UD_I3dnow:
            self.mnemonic = ud_itab[ self.le.table[ self.inp_curr() ] ].mnemonic

        if self.mnemonic == UD_Iswapgs and self.dis_mode != 64:
            self.UDERR("swapgs invalid in 64bits mode")
            return -1

        if self.mnemonic == UD_Ixchg:
            if (self.operand[0].type == UD_OP_REG and self.operand[0].base == UD_R_AX and\
                self.operand[1].type == UD_OP_REG and self.operand[1].base == UD_R_AX) or \
               (self.operand[0].type == UD_OP_REG and self.operand[0].base == UD_R_EAX and\
                self.operand[1].type == UD_OP_REG and self.operand[1].base == UD_R_EAX):
                self.operand[0].type = UD_NONE
                self.operand[1].type = UD_NONE
                self.mnemonic = UD_Inop

        if self.mnemonic == UD_Inop and self.pfx_repe:
            self.pfx_repe = 0
            self.mnemonic = UD_Ipause

        return 0

    def decodeA(self, op):
        if self.opr_mode == 16:
            op.type = UD_OP_PTR
            op.size = 32
            op.lval.ptr.off = self.inpUint16()
            op.lval.ptr.seg = self.inpUint16()
        else:
            op.type = UD_OP_PTR
            op.size = 48
            op.lval.ptr.off = self.inpUint32()
            op.lval.ptr.seg = self.inpUint16()

    def decodeGPR(self, s, rm):
        if s == 64:
            return UD_R_RAX + rm
        elif s == 32:
            return UD_R_EAX + rm
        elif s == 16:
            return UD_R_AX + rm
        elif s == 8:
            if self.dis_mode == 64 and self.pfx_rex and rm >= 4:
                return UD_R_SPL + (rm - 4)
            return UD_R_AL + rm
        elif s == 0:
            if self.error == 0:
                print(self.error)
                raise Exception
            return UD_NONE
        else:
            print("Invalid operand size")
            raise Exception
        return UD_NONE

    def decodeReg(self, opr, tp, num, size):
        size = self.resolveOperandSize(size)
        reg = 0
        if tp == REGCLASS_GPR:
            reg = self.decodeGPR(size, num)
        elif tp == REGCLASS_MMX:
            reg = UD_R_MM0 + (num & 7)
        elif tp == REGCLASS_XMM:
            if size == SZ_QQ:
                reg = UD_R_YMM0 + num
            else:
                reg = UD_R_XMM0 + num
        elif tp == REGCLASS_CR:
            reg = UD_R_CR0 + num
        elif tp == REGCLASS_DB:
            reg = UD_R_DR0 + num
        elif tp == REGCLASS_SEG:
            if (num & 7) > 5:
                self.UDERR("invalid segment register value")
                return
            else:
                reg = UD_R_ES + (num & 7)
        else:
            raise Exception("invalid register type")
        opr.type = UD_OP_REG
        opr.base = reg
        opr.size = size

    def decodeImm(self, size, op):
        op.size = self.resolveOperandSize(size)
        op.type = UD_OP_IMM

        if op.size == 8:
            op.lval.ubyte = self.inpUint8()
        elif op.size == 16:
            op.lval.uword = self.inpUint16()
        elif op.size == 32:
            op.lval.udword = self.inpUint32()
        elif op.size == 64:
            op.lval.uqword = self.inpUint64()

    def decodeMemDisp(self, size, op):
        if size == 8:
            op.offset = 8
            op.lval.ubyte = self.inpUint8()
        elif size == 16:
            op.offset = 16
            op.lval.uword = self.inpUint16()
        elif size == 32:
            op.offset = 32
            op.lval.udword = self.inpUint32()
        elif size == 64:
            op.offset = 64
            op.lval.uqword = self.inpUint64()

    def decodeModRmReg(self, operand, tp, size):
        reg = (REX_R(self._rex) << 3) | MODRM_REG( self.modRm() )
        self.decodeReg(operand, tp, reg, size)

    def decodeModRmRm(self, op, tp, size):
        offset = 0
        mod = MODRM_MOD( self.modRm() )
        rm = (REX_B(self._rex) << 3) | MODRM_RM( self.modRm() )

        if mod == 3:
            self.decodeReg(op, tp, rm, size)
            return

        op.type = UD_OP_MEM
        op.size = self.resolveOperandSize(size)

        if self.adr_mode == 64:
            op.base = UD_R_RAX + rm
            if mod == 1:
                offset = 8
            elif mod == 2:
                offset = 32
            elif mod == 0 and (rm & 7) == 5:
                op.base = UD_R_RIP
                offset = 32
            else:
                offset = 0

            if (rm & 7) == 4:
                self.inpNext()

                op.base = UD_R_RAX + (SIB_B(self.inpCurr()) | (REX_B(self._rex) << 3))
                op.index = UD_R_RAX + (SIB_I(self.inpCurr()) | (REX_X(self._rex) << 3))

                if op.index == UD_R_RSP:
                    op.index = UD_NONE
                    op.scale = UD_NONE
                else:
                    op.scale = (1 << SIB_S( self.inpCurr() )) & ~1

                if op.base == UD_R_RBP or op.base == UD_R_R13:
                    if mod == 0:
                        op.base = UD_NONE
                    if mod == 1:
                        offset = 8
                    else:
                        offset = 32
            else:
                op.scale = UD_NONE
                op.index = UD_NONE

        elif self.adr_mode == 32:
            op.base = UD_R_EAX + rm
            if mod == 1:
                offset = 8
            elif mod == 2:
                offset = 32
            elif mod == 0 and rm == 5:
                op.base = UD_R_RIP
                offset = 32
            else:
                offset = 0

            if (rm & 7) == 4:
                self.inpNext()

                op.scale = (1 << SIB_S(self.inpCurr())) & ~1
                op.index = UD_R_EAX + (SIB_I(self.inpCurr()) | (REX_X(self._rex) << 3))
                op.base = UD_R_EAX + (SIB_B(self.inpCurr()) | (REX_B(self._rex) << 3))

                if op.index == UD_R_ESP:
                    op.index = UD_NONE
                    op.scale = UD_NONE

                if op.base == UD_R_EBP:
                    if mod == 0:
                        op.base = UD_NONE
                    if mod == 1:
                        offset = 8
                    else:
                        offset = 32
            else:
                op.scale = UD_NONE
                op.index = UD_NONE
        else:
            bases = (UD_R_BX, UD_R_BX, UD_R_BP, UD_R_BP, UD_R_SI, UD_R_DI, UD_R_BP, UD_R_BX)
            indices = (UD_R_SI, UD_R_DI, UD_R_SI, UD_R_DI, UD_NONE, UD_NONE, UD_NONE, UD_NONE)

            op.base = bases[ rm & 7 ]
            op.index = indices[ rm & 7 ]
            op.scale = UD_NONE

            if mod == 0 and rm == 6:
                offset = 16
                op.base = UD_NONE
            elif mod == 1:
                offset = 8
            elif mod == 2:
                offset = 16

        if offset:
            self.decodeMemDisp(offset, op)
        else:
            op.offset = 0

    def decodeMoffset(self, size, opr):
        opr.type = UD_OP_MEM
        opr.base = UD_NONE
        opr.index = UD_NONE
        opr.scale = UD_NONE
        opr.size = self.resolveOperandSize(size)
        self.decodeMemDisp(self.adr_mode, opr)

    def decodeVexVVVV(self, opr, size):
        if self.vex_op == 0:
            raise Exception("vex_op != 0")
        vvvv = 0
        if self.vex_op == 0xc4:
            vvvv = (self.vex_b2 >> 3) & 0xf
        else:
            vvvv = (self.vex_b1 >> 3) & 0xf

        self.decodeReg(opr, REGCLASS_XMM, (0xf & ~vvvv), size)

    def decodeVexImmReg(self, opr, size):
        imm = self.inpNext()
        mask = 7
        if self.dis_mode == 64:
            mask = 0xf

        if self.error != 0:
            return self.error

        if self.vex_op == 0:
            raise Exception("vex_op != 0")

        self.decodeReg(opr, REGCLASS_XMM, mask & (imm >> 4), size)
        return 0

    def decodeOperand(self, operand, tp, size):
        operand.type = UD_NONE
        operand._oprcode = tp

        if tp == OP_A:
            self.decodeA(operand)
        elif tp == OP_MR:
            if MODRM_MOD( self.modRm() ) == 3:
                self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, Mx_reg_size(size))
            else:
                self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, Mx_mem_size(size))
        elif tp == OP_F:
            self.br_far = 1
            if MODRM_MOD( self.modRm() ) == 3:
                self.UDERR("expected modrm.mod != 3")
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, size)
        elif tp == OP_M:
            if MODRM_MOD( self.modRm() ) == 3:
                self.UDERR("expected modrm.mod != 3")
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, size)
        elif tp == OP_E:
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, size)
        elif tp == OP_G:
            self.decodeModRmReg(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, size)
        elif tp in (OP_sI, OP_I):
            self.decodeImm(size, operand)
        elif tp == OP_I1:
            operand.type = UD_OP_CONST
            operand.lval.udword = 1
        elif tp == OP_N:
            if MODRM_MOD( self.modRm()) != 3:
                self.UDERR("expected modrm.mod == 3")
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_MMX, size)
        elif tp == OP_Q:
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_MMX, size)
        elif tp == OP_P:
            self.decodeModRmReg(operand, REGCLASS_MMX, size)
        elif tp == OP_U:
            if MODRM_MOD( self.modRm()) != 3:
                self.UDERR("expected modrm.mod == 3")
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_XMM, size)
        elif tp == OP_W:
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_XMM, size)
        elif tp == OP_V:
            self.decodeModRmReg(operand, REGCLASS_XMM, size)
        elif tp == OP_H:
            self.decodeVexVVVV(operand, size)
        elif tp == OP_MU:
            if MODRM_MOD( self.modRm() ) == 3:
                self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_XMM, Mx_reg_size(size))
            else:
                self.decodeModRmRm(operand , REGCLASS_XMM , Mx_mem_size(size))
        elif tp == OP_S:
            self.decodeModRmReg(operand, REGCLASS_SEG, size)
        elif tp == OP_O:
            self.decodeMoffset(size, operand)
        elif tp in (OP_R0, OP_R1, OP_R2, OP_R3, OP_R4, OP_R5, OP_R6, OP_R7):
            self.decodeReg(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, (REX_B(self._rex) << 3) | (tp - OP_R0), size)
        elif tp in (OP_AL , OP_AX , OP_eAX , OP_rAX):
            self.decodeReg(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, 0, size)
        elif tp in (OP_CL , OP_CX , OP_eCX):
            self.decodeReg(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, 1, size)
        elif tp in (OP_DL , OP_DX , OP_eDX):
            self.decodeReg(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, 2, size)
        elif tp in (OP_ES, OP_CS, OP_DS, OP_SS, OP_FS, OP_GS):
            if self.dis_mode == 64:
                if tp not in (OP_FS, OP_GS):
                    self.UDERR("invalid segment register in 64bits")

            operand.type = UD_OP_REG
            operand.base = (tp - OP_ES) + UD_R_ES
            operand.size = 16
        elif tp == OP_J:
            self.decodeImm(size, operand)
            operand.type = UD_OP_JIMM
        elif tp == OP_R:
            if MODRM_MOD(self.modRm()) != 3:
                self.UDERR("expected modrm.mod == 3")
            self.decodeModRmRm(operand, REGCLASS_GPR, size)
        elif tp == OP_C:
            self.decodeModRmReg(operand, REGCLASS_CR, size)
        elif tp == OP_D:
            self.decodeModRmReg(operand, REGCLASS_DB, size)
        elif tp == OP_I3:
            operand.type = UD_OP_CONST
            operand.lval.sbyte = 3
        elif tp in (OP_ST0, OP_ST1, OP_ST2, OP_ST3, OP_ST4, OP_ST5, OP_ST6, OP_ST7):
            operand.type = UD_OP_REG
            operand.base = (tp - OP_ST0) + UD_R_ST0
            operand.size = 80
        elif tp == OP_L:
            self.decodeVexImmReg(operand, size)
        else:
            operand.type = UD_NONE

        return operand.type

    def decodeOperands(self):
        self.decodeOperand(self.operand[0], self.itab_entry.operand1.type, self.itab_entry.operand1.size)

        if self.operand[0].type != UD_NONE:
            self.decodeOperand(self.operand[1] , self.itab_entry.operand2.type , self.itab_entry.operand2.size)

        if self.operand[1].type != UD_NONE:
            self.decodeOperand(self.operand[2] , self.itab_entry.operand3.type , self.itab_entry.operand3.size)

        if self.operand[2].type != UD_NONE:
            self.decodeOperand(self.operand[3] , self.itab_entry.operand4.type , self.itab_entry.operand4.size)

        return 0

    def clearInsn(self):
        self.error = 0
        self.pfx_seg = 0
        self.pfx_opr = 0
        self.pfx_adr = 0
        self.pfx_lock = 0
        self.pfx_repne = 0
        self.pfx_rep = 0
        self.pfx_repe = 0
        self.pfx_rex = 0
        self.pfx_str = 0
        self.mnemonic = UD_Inone
        self.itab_entry = None
        self.have_modrm = 0
        self.br_far = 0
        self.vex_op = 0
        self._rex = 0
        self.operand[0] = ud_operand()
        self.operand[1] = ud_operand()
        self.operand[2] = ud_operand()
        self.operand[3] = ud_operand()

    def resolvePfxStr(self):
        if self.pfx_str == 0xf3:
            if P_STR(self.itab_entry.prefix):
                self.pfx_rep = 0xf3
            else:
                self.pfx_repe = 0xf3
        elif self.pfx_str == 0xf2:
            self.pfx_repne = 0xf3
        return 0

    def resolveMode(self):
        if self.error != 0:
            return -1

        if self.dis_mode == 64:
            if P_INV64( self.itab_entry.prefix ):
                self.UDERR("instruction invalid in 64bits")
                return -1

            if self.vex_op == 0xc4:
                self._rex = ((~(self.vex_b1 >> 5) & 0x7) | # rex.0rxb
                              ((self.vex_b2 >> 4) & 0x8))  # rex.w000
            elif self.vex_op == 0xc5:
                self._rex = (~(self.vex_b1 >> 5)) & 4
            else:
                if self.vex_op != 0:
                    print("vex_op == 0")
                    raise Exception
                self._rex = self.pfx_rex

            self._rex &= REX_PFX_MASK( self.itab_entry.prefix )

            default64 = P_DEF64( self.itab_entry.prefix )

            if REX_W(self._rex):
                self.opr_mode = 64
            elif self.pfx_opr:
                self.opr_mode = 16
            elif default64:
                self.opr_mode = 64
            else:
                self.opr_mode = 32

            if self.pfx_adr:
                self.adr_mode = 32
            else:
                self.adr_mode = 64
        elif self.dis_mode == 32:
            if self.pfx_opr:
                self.opr_mode = 16
            else:
                self.opr_mode = 32

            if self.pfx_adr:
                self.adr_mode = 16
            else:
                self.adr_mode = 32
        elif self.dis_mode == 16:
            if self.pfx_opr:
                self.opr_mode = 32
            else:
                self.opr_mode = 16

            if self.pfx_adr:
                self.adr_mode = 32
            else:
                self.adr_mode = 16
        return 0

    def decodeInsn(self, ptr):
        if (ptr & 0x8000) != 0:
            print("(ptr & 0x8000) == 0")
            raise Exception
        self.itab_entry = ud_itab[ ptr ]
        self.mnemonic = self.itab_entry.mnemonic
        if self.resolvePfxStr() != 0 or\
            self.resolveMode() != 0 or\
            self.decodeOperands() != 0 or\
            self.resolveMnemonic() != 0:
            return -1
        return 0

    def decode3dnow(self):
        if self.le.type != UD_TAB__OPC_3DNOW:
            raise Exception("le.type != UD_TAB__OPC_3DNOW")
        if self.le.table[0xc] == 0:
            raise Exception("le.table[0xc] == 0")

        self.decodeInsn(self.le.table[0xc])
        self.inpNext()
        if self.error != 0:
            return -1

        ptr = self.le.table[ self.inpCurr() ]

        if (ptr & 0x8000) != 0:
            raise Exception("(ptr & 0x8000) != 0")

        self.mnemonic = ud_itab[ptr].mnemonic
        return 0

    def decodeSSEpfx(self):
        pfx = self.pfx_str
        if pfx == 0:
            pfx = self.pfx_opr

        idx = ((pfx & 0xf) + 1) // 2
        if self.le.table[idx] == 0:
            idx = 0

        if idx and self.le.table[idx] != 0:
            self.pfx_str = 0
            if pfx == 0x66:
                self.pfx_opr = 0

        return self.decodeExt(self.le.table[idx])

    def decodeVex(self):
        if self.dis_mode != 64 and MODRM_MOD( self.inpPeek() ) != 0x3:
            return self.decodeExt(self.le.table[0])

        self.vex_op = self.inpCurr()
        self.vex_b1 = self.inpNext()

        index = 0
        if self.vex_op == 0xc4:
            self.vex_b2 = self.inpNext()

            if self.error != 0:
                return self.error

            m = self.vex_b1 & 0x1f
            if m == 0 or m > 3:
                return self.UDERR("reserved vex.m-mmmm value")

            pp = self.vex_b2 & 3
            index = (pp < 2) | m
        else:
            if self.vex_op != 0xc5:
                raise Exception("vex_op != 0xc5")
            index = 1 | ((self.vex_b1 & 3) << 2)

        return self.decodeExt(self.le.table[index])

    def decodeExt(self, ptr):
        idx = 0
        if (ptr & 0x8000) == 0:
            return self.decodeInsn(ptr)

        self.le = ud_lookup_table_list[ (~0x8000 & ptr) ]

        letype = self.le.type
        if letype == UD_TAB__OPC_3DNOW:
            return self.decode3dnow()

        if letype == UD_TAB__OPC_MOD:
            idx = ( MODRM_MOD( self.modRm() ) + 1 ) // 4
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_MODE:
            idx = 0
            if self.dis_mode == 64:
                idx = 1
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_OSIZE:
            idx = self.effOprMode(self.dis_mode, REX_W(self.pfx_rex), self.pfx_opr) // 32
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_ASIZE:
            idx = self.effAdrMode(self.dis_mode, self.pfx_adr) // 32
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_X87:
            idx = self.modRm() - 0xc0
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_VENDOR:
            if self.vendor == UD_VENDOR_ANY:
                idx = 0
                if self.le.table[idx] == 0:
                    idx = 1
            elif self.vendor == UD_VENDOR_AMD:
                idx = 0
            else:
                idx = 1
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_RM:
            idx = MODRM_RM(self.modRm())
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_REG:
            idx = MODRM_REG(self.modRm())
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_SSE:
            return self.decodeSSEpfx()
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_VEX:
            return self.decodeVex()
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_VEX_W:
            idx = self.vex_w()
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_VEX_L:
            idx = self.vex_l()
        elif letype == UD_TAB__OPC_TABLE:
            self.inpNext()
            return self.decodeOpcode()
        else:
            print("not reached")
            raise Exception

        return self.decodeExt(self.le.table[ idx ])

    def decodeOpcode(self):
        if self.le.type != UD_TAB__OPC_TABLE:
            print("self.le.type == UD_TAB__OPC_TABLE")
            raise Exception
        if self.error != 0:
            return self.error
        ptr = self.le.table[ self.inpCurr() ]
        return self.decodeExt(ptr)

    def decode(self):
        self.inpStart()
        self.clearInsn()

        self.le = ud_lookup_table_list[0]
        self.error = 0

        if self.decodePrefixes() == -1 or self.decodeOpcode() == -1:
            self.error = 1

        if self.error != 0:
            self.clearInsn()
            self.itab_entry = ud_itab[0]
            self.mnemonic = self.itab_entry.mnemonic

        if P_SEG( self.itab_entry.prefix) == 0 and\
            self.operand[0].type != UD_OP_MEM and\
            self.operand[0].type != UD_OP_MEM:
            self.pfx_seg = 0

        self.insn_offset = self.pc
        self.pc += self.inp_ctr

        return self.inp_ctr

    def setBuf(self, buf):
        self.inp_buf_index = 0
        self.inp_buf = buf
        self.inp_end = False



```

`new/udis86_decodeh.py`:

```py
MAX_INSN_LENGTH = 15
P_none = 0

P_inv64 =        ( 1 << 0 )
def P_INV64(n):
    return ( ( n >> 0 ) & 1 )

P_def64 =        ( 1 << 1 )
def P_DEF64(n):
    return ( ( n >> 1 ) & 1 )

P_oso =          ( 1 << 2 )
def P_OSO(n):
    return ( ( n >> 2 ) & 1 )

P_aso =          ( 1 << 3 )
def P_ASO(n):
    return ( ( n >> 3 ) & 1 )

P_rexb =         ( 1 << 4 )
def P_REXB(n):
    return ( ( n >> 4 ) & 1 )

P_rexw =         ( 1 << 5 )
def P_REXW(n):
    return ( ( n >> 5 ) & 1 )

P_rexr =         ( 1 << 6 )
def P_REXR(n):
    return( ( n >> 6 ) & 1 )

P_rexx =         ( 1 << 7 )
def P_REXX(n):
    return ( ( n >> 7 ) & 1 )

P_seg =          ( 1 << 8 )
def P_SEG(n):
    return ( ( n >> 8 ) & 1 )

P_vexl =         ( 1 << 9 )
def P_VEXL(n):
    return ( ( n >> 9 ) & 1 )

P_vexw =         ( 1 << 10 )
def P_VEXW(n):
    return ( ( n >> 10 ) & 1 )

P_str =          ( 1 << 11 )
def P_STR(n):
    return ( ( n >> 11 ) & 1 )

P_strz =         ( 1 << 12 )
def P_STR_ZF(n):
    return ( ( n >> 12 ) & 1 )

def Mx_mem_size(size):
    return (size >> 8) & 0xff

def Mx_reg_size(size):
    return size & 0xff

class ud_itab_entry_operand:
    type = 0
    size = 0

    def __init__(self, t = 0, s = 0):
        self.type = t
        self.size = s

class ud_itab_entry:
    mnemonic = 0
    operand1 = None
    operand2 = None
    operand3 = None
    operand4 = None
    prefix = 0

    def __init__(self, m = 0, o1 = None, o2 = None, o3 = None, o4 = None, p = 0):
        self.mnemonic = m
        if o1 == None:
            o1 = ud_itab_entry_operand()
        if o2 == None:
            o2 = ud_itab_entry_operand()
        if o3 == None:
            o3 = ud_itab_entry_operand()
        if o4 == None:
            o4 = ud_itab_entry_operand()
        self.operand1 = o1
        self.operand2 = o2
        self.operand3 = o3
        self.operand4 = o4
        self.prefix = p

class ud_lookup_table_list_entry:
    table = None
    type = 0
    meta = None

    def __init__(self, tb = 0, tt = 0, m = 0):
        self.table = tb
        self.type = tt
        self.meta = m
```

`new/udis86_syn.py`:

```py
from udis86_decode import *
from udis86 import *

ud_reg_tab = (
    "al",   "cl",   "dl",   "bl",
    "ah",   "ch",   "dh",   "bh",
    "spl",  "bpl",  "sil",  "dil",
    "r8b",  "r9b",  "r10b", "r11b",
    "r12b", "r13b", "r14b", "r15b",

    "ax",   "cx",   "dx",   "bx",
    "sp",   "bp",   "si",   "di",
    "r8w",  "r9w",  "r10w", "r11w",
    "r12w", "r13w", "r14w", "r15w",

    "eax",  "ecx",  "edx",  "ebx",
    "esp",  "ebp",  "esi",  "edi",
    "r8d",  "r9d",  "r10d", "r11d",
    "r12d", "r13d", "r14d", "r15d",

    "rax",  "rcx",  "rdx",  "rbx",
    "rsp",  "rbp",  "rsi",  "rdi",
    "r8",   "r9",   "r10",  "r11",
    "r12",  "r13",  "r14",  "r15",

    "es",   "cs",   "ss",   "ds",
    "fs",   "gs",

    "cr0",  "cr1",  "cr2",  "cr3",
    "cr4",  "cr5",  "cr6",  "cr7",
    "cr8",  "cr9",  "cr10", "cr11",
    "cr12", "cr13", "cr14", "cr15",

    "dr0",  "dr1",  "dr2",  "dr3",
    "dr4",  "dr5",  "dr6",  "dr7",
    "dr8",  "dr9",  "dr10", "dr11",
    "dr12", "dr13", "dr14", "dr15",

    "mm0",  "mm1",  "mm2",  "mm3",
    "mm4",  "mm5",  "mm6",  "mm7",

    "st0",  "st1",  "st2",  "st3",
    "st4",  "st5",  "st6",  "st7",

    "xmm0", "xmm1", "xmm2", "xmm3",
    "xmm4", "xmm5", "xmm6", "xmm7",
    "xmm8", "xmm9", "xmm10", "xmm11",
    "xmm12", "xmm13", "xmm14", "xmm15",

    "ymm0", "ymm1", "ymm2",   "ymm3",
    "ymm4", "ymm5", "ymm6",   "ymm7",
    "ymm8", "ymm9", "ymm10",  "ymm11",
    "ymm12", "ymm13", "ymm14", "ymm15",

    "rip"
)

def udSynRelTarget(u, opr):
    trunc_mask = 0xffffffffffffffff >> (64 - u.opr_mode)
    if opr.size == 8:
        return (u.pc + opr.lval.sbyte) & trunc_mask
    elif opr.size == 16:
        return (u.pc + opr.lval.sword) & trunc_mask
    elif opr.size == 32:
        return (u.pc + opr.lval.sdword) & trunc_mask
    else:
        raise Exception("invalid relative offset size")
    return 0

def udSynPrintAddr(u, addr):
    if u.sym_resolver != None:
        name, offset = u.sym_resolver(u, addr)
        if name:
            if offset:
                u.asm_buf += "{:s}{:+d}".format(name, offset)
            else:
                u.asm_buf += name
    else:
        u.asm_buf += "0x{:x}".format(addr)


def udSynExpandSign(v, ss, ds):
    if ss >= ds:
        return v

    srcmask = (1 << ss) - 1
    srcsign = (1 << (ss - 1))

    v &= srcmask
    if v & srcsign:
        dstmask = (1 << ds) - 1
        extend = dstmask ^ srcmask
        v |= extend

    return v


def udSynPrintImm(u, op):
    v = 0
    if op._oprcode == OP_sI and op.size != u.opr_mode:
        if op.size == 8:
            v = udSynExpandSign(op.lval.sbyte, 8, 64)
        else:
            if op.size != 32:
                raise Exception("op.size != 32")
            v = udSynExpandSign(op.lval.sdword, 32, 64)

        if u.opr_mode < 64:
            v = v & ((1 << u.opr_mode) - 1)
    else:
        if op.size == 8:
            v = op.lval.ubyte
        elif op.size == 16:
            v = op.lval.uword
        elif op.size == 32:
            v = op.lval.udword
        elif op.size == 64:
            v = op.lval.uqword
        else:
            raise Exception("invalid offset")
            v = 0
    u.asm_buf += "0x{:x}".format(v)

def udSynPrintMemDisp(u, op, sign):
    if op.offset == 0:
        raise Exception("op.offset == 0")

    if op.base == UD_NONE and op.index == UD_NONE:
        if op.scale != UD_NONE or op.offset == 8:
            raise Exception("op.scale != UD_NONE or op.offset == 8")
        v = 0
        if op.offset == 16:
            v = op.lval.uword
        elif op.offset == 32:
            v = op.lval.udword
        elif op.offset == 64:
            v = op.lval.uqword
        else:
            raise Exception("invalid offset")
            v = 0

        u.asm_buf += "0x{:x}".format(v)
    else:
        if op.offset == 64:
            raise Exception("op.offset == 64")
        v = 0
        if op.offset == 8:
            v = op.lval.sbyte
        elif op.offset == 16:
            v = op.lval.sword
        elif op.offset == 32:
            v = op.lval.sdword
        else:
            raise Exception("invalid offset")
            v = 0

        if v < 0:
            u.asm_buf += "-0x{:x}".format(-v)
        elif v > 0:
            if sign:
                u.asm_buf += "+0x{:x}".format(v)
            else:
                u.asm_buf += "0x{:x}".format(v)

def udTranslateUpper(s, upper):
    if upper:
        return s.upper()
    return s

def udTranslateIntelOprCast(u, op):
    if u.br_far:
        u.asm_buf += "far "
    if op.size == 8:
        u.asm_buf += "byte "
    elif op.size == 16:
        u.asm_buf += "word "
    elif op.size == 32:
        u.asm_buf += "dword "
    elif op.size == 64:
        u.asm_buf += "qword "
    elif op.size == 80:
        u.asm_buf += "tword "
    elif op.size == 128:
        u.asm_buf += "oword "
    elif op.size == 256:
        u.asm_buf += "yword "

def udTranslateIntelGenOperand(u, op, syn_cast, upper = False):
    if op.type == UD_OP_REG:
        u.asm_buf += udTranslateUpper(ud_reg_tab[op.base - UD_R_AL], upper)
    elif op.type == UD_OP_MEM:
        if syn_cast:
            udTranslateIntelOprCast(u, op)
        u.asm_buf += "["
        if u.pfx_seg:
            u.asm_buf += udTranslateUpper(ud_reg_tab[u.pfx_seg - UD_R_AL], upper) + ":"
        if op.base:
            u.asm_buf += udTranslateUpper(ud_reg_tab[op.base - UD_R_AL], upper)
        if op.index:
            if op.base != UD_NONE:
                u.asm_buf += "+"
            u.asm_buf += udTranslateUpper(ud_reg_tab[op.index - UD_R_AL], upper)
            if op.scale:
                u.asm_buf += "*{:d}".format(op.scale)
            else:
                u.asm_buf += "*1"

        if op.offset != 0:
            if op.base != UD_NONE or op.index != UD_NONE:
                udSynPrintMemDisp(u, op, 1)
            else:
                udSynPrintMemDisp(u, op, 0)
        u.asm_buf += "]"
    elif op.type == UD_OP_IMM:
        udSynPrintImm(u, op)
    elif op.type == UD_OP_JIMM:
        udSynPrintAddr(u, udSynRelTarget(u, op))
    elif op.type == UD_OP_PTR:
        if op.size == 32:
            u.asm_buf += "word 0x{:x}:0x{:x}".format(op.lval.ptr.seg, op.lval.ptr.off & 0xFFFF)
        elif op.size == 48:
            u.asm_buf += "dword 0x{:x}:0x{:x}".format(op.lval.ptr.seg, op.lval.ptr.off)
    elif op.type == UD_OP_CONST:
        if syn_cast:
            udTranslateIntelOprCast(u, op)
        u.asm_buf += "{:d}".format(op.lval.udword)

def udTranslateIntel(u, upper = False):
    u.asm_buf = ""
    if P_OSO(u.itab_entry.prefix) == 0 and u.pfx_opr:
        if u.dis_mode == 16:
            u.asm_buf += "o32 "
        elif u.dis_mode in (32, 64):
            u.asm_buf += "o16 "

    if P_ASO(u.itab_entry.prefix) == 0 and u.pfx_adr:
        if u.dis_mode == 16:
            u.asm_buf += "a32 "
        elif u.dis_mode == 32:
            u.asm_buf += "a16 "
        elif u.dis_mode == 64:
            u.asm_buf += "a32 "

    if u.pfx_seg and \
       u.operand[0].type != UD_OP_MEM and \
       u.operand[1].type != UD_OP_MEM:
        u.asm_buf += udTranslateUpper( ud_reg_tab[u.pfx_seg - UD_R_AL] + " ", upper )

    if u.pfx_lock:
        u.asm_buf += "lock "
    if u.pfx_rep:
        u.asm_buf += "rep "
    elif u.pfx_repe:
        u.asm_buf += "repe "
    elif u.pfx_repne:
        u.asm_buf += "repne "

    u.asm_buf += udTranslateUpper( udLookupMnemonic(u.mnemonic), upper )

    if u.operand[0].type != UD_NONE:
        cast = 0
        u.asm_buf += " "
        if u.operand[0].type == UD_OP_MEM:
            if u.operand[1].type in (UD_OP_IMM, UD_OP_CONST, UD_NONE) or\
                u.operand[0].size != u.operand[1].size:
                cast = 1
            elif u.operand[1].type == UD_OP_REG and u.operand[1].base == UD_R_CL:
                if u.mnemonic in (UD_Ircl, UD_Irol, UD_Iror, UD_Ircr, UD_Ishl, UD_Ishr, UD_Isar):
                    cast = 1

        udTranslateIntelGenOperand(u, u.operand[0], cast, upper)

    if u.operand[1].type != UD_NONE:
        cast = 0
        u.asm_buf += ", "
        if u.operand[1].type == UD_OP_MEM and\
           u.operand[0].size != u.operand[1].size and\
           not u.operand[0].isSreg():
            cast = 1

        udTranslateIntelGenOperand(u , u.operand[1] , cast , upper)

    if u.operand[2].type != UD_NONE:
        cast = 0
        u.asm_buf += ", "
        if u.operand[2].type == UD_OP_MEM and\
           u.operand[2].size != u.operand[1].size:
            cast = 1

        udTranslateIntelGenOperand(u , u.operand[2] , cast , upper)

    if u.operand[3].type != UD_NONE:
        u.asm_buf += ", "
        udTranslateIntelGenOperand(u , u.operand[3] , 0 , upper)

    return u.asm_buf


```
